headline: Unum Group Trades Above 200-Day SMA: Time to Buy or Hold the Stock?
summary: UNM eyes premium and earnings growth in 2026, backed by strong sales trends, persistency and expanding product lines.

raw.headline: Unum Group Trades Above 200-Day SMA: Time to Buy or Hold the Stock?

headline: 3 Reasons AFL is Risky and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
summary: Aflac has been treading water for the past six months, recording a small return of 0.8% while holding steady at $115.26. The stock also fell short of the S&P 500’s 9.9% gain during that period.
